text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Dr. Victor Odumuyiwa is the Director of the National Information Technology Development Agency (NITDA) hub (NITHub) at UNILAG.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"Director, National Information Technology Development Agency (NITDA) hub, (NITHub), UNILAG.","entailment":"The quoted title directly states his role as Director of the NITDA hub at UNILAG.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"definitional"},{"statement":"Professor Taibat Olaitan Lawanson is the Co-Director of the Centre for Housing and Sustainable Development at UNILAG.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"Co-Director, Centre for Housing and Sustainable Development, UNILAG.","entailment":"The quoted title explicitly identifies her as Co-Director of that centre.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"definitional"},{"statement":"Professor Abraham Osinubi is the Dean of the School of Postgraduate Studies at UNILAG.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"Dean, School of Postgraduate Studies.","entailment":"The quoted line directly names his position as Dean of the School of Postgraduate Studies.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"definitional"},{"statement":"When you join any of UNILAG's Schools and Colleges, you become part of its legacy of impactful knowledge and cutting‑edge research.","claimType":"value","quote":"You become a part of our legacy of impactful knowledge and cutting-edge research.","entailment":"The quoted sentence asserts that joining the university makes one part of its legacy of knowledge and research.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"normative"},{"statement":"UNILAG does not just educate;
